network_summary: Dr. Mohamed Waheed, DDS is the sole dentist-owner of a personal multi-office dental group in Chicagoland. He operates under two distinct brands: Grand Smiles PLLC (a pediatric-focused group with 4 IL locations: Bensenville, Chicago/West Town, Palos Heights, Rockford) and Elite Dentistry PC (general/cosmetic dentistry, Glendale Heights; separate brand also in Addison and Palatine). DHCCLTD (Bolingbrook) is an org_only_npi shell with 0 providers — a billing/admin entity, not an operating clinic. No MSO, management company, DSO affiliation, or PE backing was found. This is a straightforward dentist-owned multi-location private group.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Mohamed Waheed, DDS — listed as PRESIDENT on Elite Dentistry PC (NPI 1598163305), OWNER on Grand Smiles 3 PLLC (NPI 1598645962), and DENTIST on DHCCLTD (NPI 1174916233) and Grand Smiles 2 (NPI 1376321554). Website: grandsmiles.org (Grand Smiles PLLC), elitedentistryaddison.com (Elite Dentistry).

evidence_chain: AO signal: Mohamed Waheed appears as authorized official on 4 org-NPIs across 4 Chicagoland ZIPs (60139, 60463, 60490, 60622). Documentary corroboration: (1) grandsmiles.org is a live public website for Grand Smiles PLLC showing Dr. Waheed as sole doctor/owner across Bensenville, Chicago, Palos Heights, and Rockford offices — confirming multi-location ownership; (2) elitedentistryaddison.com confirms Dr. Waheed as dentist-owner of Elite Dentistry (separate brand, general/cosmetic dentistry); (3) NPPES AO titles confirm direct ownership (PRESIDENT, OWNER). No MSO/management company/PE structure found on either brand's website or in NPPES records. DHCCLTD has 0 providers and is already classified org_only_npi — confirmed shell. Miswak Dentistry website (DA-tagged for Grand Smiles 2 NPI) belongs to a different practice (different owner, different address) — data-quality note.
future_app_notes: Grand Smiles PLLC has 4 locations but only 3 are in watched Chicagoland ZIPs (Rockford 61104 is out-of-scope). Elite Dentistry appears under multiple entity names and addresses (Addison 516 W Lake St per website vs Glendale Heights 24 Dennison Dr per NPPES; also Palatine 60074). These may be relocations or separate registrations. If Elite Dentistry Addison (elitedentistryaddison.com, 516 W Lake St, Addison IL 60101) has its own NPI in a watched ZIP, it should be checked. The Grand Smiles brand is pediatric-focused (ages 0-18 per website) but uses general taxonomy codes (1223G0001X, 122300000X) rather than pediatric specialty (1223P0221X) — not specialist-only by taxonomy, so counts in GP denominator. Confirm whether any Grand Smiles or Elite Dentistry locations remain unmatched in practice_locations.
